messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for knee arthroscopy for member NH-619569 with persistent medial knee pain and locking episodes after twelve weeks of documented physical therapy and NSAIDs. Attached: orthopedic surgeon order and conservative therapy records; the MRI report referenced in the order is not attached.
